events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the soft foot condition (dial reading ~6-8 mils, well above the ~2 mil API 686 acceptance limit) invalidates any alignment readings taken under it, since torquing the feet distorts the frame — this is a **fail**, high risk, requiring shim correction and full re-alignment before closeout.
